testcase.name: test_capture
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.Unit.Application.test_paypal_adaptor.PayPalAdaptorTest testMethod=test_capture> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4466456096'> mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4466457104'>
@mock.patch('requests.post', side_effect=mocked_requests_post) @mock.patch('requests.get', side_effect=mocked_requests_get) def test_capture(self, mock_get, mock_post): payment = Payment( 1000, 'EUR', '1234', '4H120426JX758114N', payment_method=PaymentMethod.PAYPAL ) > self._service.capture(payment)

self = <modules.Application.PluginAdaptors.PayPal.GetAccessToken.GetAccessTokenRequest.GetAccessTokenRequest object at 0x10a584050>
def _post(self) -> dict: if self._is_form_encoded(): headers = self._headers() headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' > response = self.http.request('POST', self._endpoint(), fields=self._data(), headers=headers, auth=self._auth()) ^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'GetAccessTokenRequest' object has no attribute 'http'
modules/Application/PluginAdaptors/HTTPMixin.py:31: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_create
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.Unit.Application.test_paypal_adaptor.PayPalAdaptorTest testMethod=test_create> mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4468523760'>
@mock.patch('requests.post', side_effect=mocked_requests_post) def test_create(self, mock_post): payment = Payment( 1000, 'EUR', '1234', None, 'FAKE_RETURN_URL', payment_method=PaymentMethod.PAYPAL ) payer = Payer( 'John', 'Doe', 'demo-customer@example.com', '1 Rue des Roses', '2nd Floor', 'Nantes', 'FR', '44230', 'fr' ) > self._service.pay(payment, payer)

testcase.name: test_status
testcase.failure:
